purpose: Extended Saudi family three generations around iftar table during Ramadan. Multi-generational, authentic.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Warm authentic photograph of extended Saudi family gathered around large iftar table just after sunset breaking Ramadan fast, three generations visible — grandfather in white thobe and ghutra, father in thobe, mother and adult daughter in modest hijab and conservative colored abayas, young children at table edge, table covered with traditional Saudi iftar foods including dates and water cups at center, vimto in glasses, samosas, harees, lamb dish, {featured_dish}, warm tungsten ambient interior lighting, soft golden-hour quality from window indicating just-after-sunset timing, candid moment with some family members reaching for food, real skin textures on all faces, natural expressions of gratitude and quiet conversation, shot from elevated angle suggesting phone-camera positioning, authentic non-staged composition {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: model perfect features
Avoid in output: smooth plastic skin
Never present non-Saudi talent or generic Middle-Eastern look — Saudi specificity is the point
Avoid tourist-photography aesthetic; this is lived-in lifestyle, not destination shoot
notes: Intents: launch, grow, defend. Source code in research corpus: S03. Saudi adaptation guidance: Critical: family scenes never depict romantic interaction. Just-after-sunset lighting essential (pre-sunset suggests breaking fast early — religiously incorrect). Featured dish matches brand region: Najdi → jereesh/harees, Hejazi → mandi/saleeg. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: Daily during Ramadan for F&B. Compliance level: elevated.
